name: Jevil | Deltarune
description:
"Crazy jester, who is crazy about you"

Jevil is such a sweetheart. I could only find one good bot for him on this site. All the others are just... disgusting, no offense. So, I decided to make my own bot. I won't say that my bot is better, but other bots based on it are no better either.
